question.label: Needed to change
question.name: When you say 'what needed to change' — what felt unclear exactly?
question.description: Clarifies the specific expectation gap he felt after the promotion decision.

answer: I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.

assessment.note: He narrowed his focus to delivery because it felt controllable, signalling disengagement from broader team participation and uncertainty outside his immediate remit. [THREAD-DEFERRED] 'delivery because that felt controllable' could be worth unpacking next session, but drill cap requires advancing the arc.

new_queue.label: Set the frame
new_queue.name: Before we get into specifics, what would be most useful to talk through today?

new_queue.label: What landed
new_queue.name: What feedback do you think landed most clearly for you?

new_queue.label: Feedback gap
new_queue.name: What part of the feedback still feels unresolved to you?

new_queue.label: Next path
new_queue.name: What concrete path forward do you see for yourself from here?

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
